data.requirement: Join soil_analysis_data with crop_production_data on District field only since soil data isn't crop-specific
data.reason: Original join on Crop is invalid - soil analysis doesn't contain crop information. District-level alignment maintains geographic relevance for soil-yield correlations

data.requirement: Remove temporal aggregation requirement as soil analysis data lacks time dimension
data.reason: Soil_analysis_data contains no date/season column, making temporal analysis impossible. Focus instead on spatial nutrient patterns

visualization.requirement: Replace small multiple heat maps with vertical grouped bar charts showing soil type distribution per district with yield efficiency overlay
visualization.reason: District names as text categories work better in bar charts than heat map axes. Enables direct comparison of soil prevalence vs productivity

visualization.requirement: Change to box plots showing distributions of organic matter (%) within each soil type category
visualization.reason: Original stacked bars required unavailable irrigation data. Box plots better show soil composition variability while using only soil table data

interaction.requirement: Replace time filter with season filter using crop_production_data's Season field
interaction.reason: Enables analysis of Rabi/Kharif season impacts on yield-soil relationships through parametric filtering
